name: banana bread
instructions: 1 + 1/3 cups all-purpose flour, 3 bananas, 3/4 cup sugar, 1/3 cup yogurt, 2 eggs, 1 tsp baking powder, 1 tsp baking soda, 1/2 tsp salt, 1 tsp vanilla. 1/3 cup butter can swap for the yogurt. bake at 350.
notes: zaynab issa, third culture cooking. original recipe calls for 1 cup all-purpose flour; we use 1 + 1/3 cups.
